## Verdict
NO

## Notes
Based on your current progress, in-progress courses, and planned courses, you will have accumulated 47 credits by the end of Spring 2027. A total of 120 credits are required for graduation, meaning you will still need 73 credits. Additionally, several major-specific courses and a significant portion of your Core 39 requirements will remain outstanding.
